page: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the EDSv4 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 20 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 10 physical Intel Xeon 8272CL cores with hyper-threading enabled. The processor operates at a base frequency of 2.6 GHz and includes 35 MB of L3 cache. The system is equipped with 160.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It also includes 768 GB of local NVMe SSD storage and supports Premium Storage.

Benchmark evaluations place the E20ds_v4 consistently in the average performance tier across multiple workloads. The CPU achieved a stress-ng single-core score of 1414.88 and a multi-core score of 18605.2, while the PassMark CPU score reached 19266.4. Memory bandwidth tests showed read-only speeds of 1038.89 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 80.0 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. In database and application-level benchmarks, the instance processed 17.23 million Redis SET operations per second and achieved a PassMark database operations score of 7262.76.

While the instance demonstrates solid capabilities for memory-intensive tasks, it exhibits performance limitations in complex compute workloads. For example, LLM inference prompt processing with a medium 7B model dropped to a weak tier at 30.52 tokens/sec, though text generation for the same model remained average at 10.93 tokens/sec. The lack of GPU acceleration makes it unsuitable for large-scale deep learning. Given its high memory density, local storage capacity, and average database performance, the E20ds_v4 is suited for relational databases, in-memory caching, data analytics, and enterprise applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the EDSv4 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8272CL processor running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It provides 20 dedicated vCPUs across 10 physical cores, 160.0 GB of RAM, and 768 GB of local SSD storage. The hardware configuration delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. In performance testing, the instance achieves average scores across most categories, including a PassMark CPU score of 19266.4 and a Redis throughput of 17.23 million SET operations per second. However, it exhibits weaker performance in complex tasks like medium-model LLM prompt processing. This instance is designed for memory-intensive workloads, relational databases, and caching layers that benefit from local storage and high memory capacity without requiring GPU acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v4 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 20 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 160 GB of RAM, and 768 GB of local SSD storage, designed for database and memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E20ds_v4 is a memory-optimized VM with 20 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 160 GB of RAM, and 768 GB of local storage for database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, high memory density, and integrated local SSD storage for database workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8272CL processor with 20 dedicated vCPUs and 160 GB RAM
768 GB of bundled local SSD storage with Premium Storage capability
High memory density of 8.0 GB per core for memory-bound applications
Average database performance with 17.23 million Redis SET operations per second
Suited for relational databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
